note: seq=80: TEST + INCORPORATE DB-write batching under real load. (1) BOUNDED requeue of 200k real records missing website/email -> pending (refills the drained queue with genuine re-enrichment work AND lifts coverage; reversible). (2) Start the batched-writer CANARY atlas-enrich-async-batch@1 (ATLAS_ASYNC_BATCH_WRITES=25, PG_POOL<=8, MemoryMax=2G, circuit-breaker armed -> throttle-not-crash) pointed at the same queue; the live per-record writers keep running so we compare. (3) Measurement probe atlas-batch-canary on a 60s timer: queue dist, enrich done-rate (timestamped delta), PG total/active conns vs ceiling 85, load avg, pg connect-time -> publishes batch-canary.json with a SEV-1 monitor (conns>ceiling / load spike / slow connect => sev1_flags, back off). HARD SAFETY: bounded requeue (200k, not millions), pool<=8, circuit-breaker, continuous monitor. Honest: >2k only shows once the requeue refills writes; if it doesn't hit 2k the probe reports the real number.

steps.note: seq=80: requeue 200k + batched canary + measurement probe (batching under real load, SEV-1 monitored).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_requeue.py':'28d7e8716a06c7a82036799e938823060c2ec270e61e86b7708440882a45fda7','/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_batch_canary.py':'0c33d61879e022405ab7ce9048b409ef5fb1e28f2b2eeb1bbcd8b302923eabf2'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('shas ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS batched-writer canary measurement probe
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_batch_canary.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS batch-canary measurement timer

[Timer]
OnBootSec=30s
OnUnitActiveSec=60s
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-enrich-async-batch@1.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-enrich-async-batch@1.service']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-batch-canary.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-batch-canary.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-batch-canary.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-batch-canary.service']); print('canary writer + measurement live')"
